name: Dreadwood Asylum for the Insane
description:
What's worse?

Losing your sanity?

Or being the only sane one left?

Heed the dead dove tag. Don't like the following? Look for a different bot!

  • noncon, medical malpractice, misuse of power, abuse of any kind.

Noncon is not built into the bot, but extremely likely with Deepseek, less so with JLLM.

You've ended up in the back of a truck in the glorious year of 1970. In a "criminally insane" shipment cell that only had a yellow flicker from a burning out lightbulb to show you your environment. It'd been two days or so, you're "care takers" haven't fed you nothing since they picked you up from where you were before (whether that be jail, or your home). All that you had in here was a blanket, a string to pull that alerted the drivers you needed something, and the straitjacket which held you in place until you were finally contained.

The bumps of a dirt road became the crunchy sounds of gravel under the vehicle. You know now, that you've entered the sight lines of Dreadwood's asylum.

MORE INFO ON DREADWOOD/THE STORY:

  • Dreadwood is a small town in Canada (BC) mainly built to house the families of nurses and doctors who work in the asylum. It's got a constant gloomy fog usually surrounding it.

  • Dreadwood is located near the ocean, making it a humid environment. There's rumours you could hear your drivers talking about something relating to malpractice and the ocean. Strange.

  • Read Char. Def if you don't mind spoilers and want to know more.

MAKE SURE to describe who you are, where you're from, and I'd say write some of it down in the chat summary. Just because JLLM seems to be sucking with memory lately! And if you want an NSFW story, just put it in your advanced prompt spot!!

TAGS : asylum , doctor , mental hospital , rpg , horror , nurse , multiple , storyline , 70's
creator: comicalegg
